title: 10 best herbal teas for diarrhea
description: Carum carvi, also known as caraway, teas helps with diarrhea because of its soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. The tea is rich in carvone, a compound that helps to calm the digestive system and reduce inflammation in the intestines. This can help to slow down the movement of food through the digestive system, giving the body a chance to absorb the necessary nutrients.
